title: Oaxacan Mellow Birria Stew
description: A rich and flavorful stew originating from Oaxaca, Mexico. Mellow cheese adds a creamy twist to the classic dish.

ingredients.name: Birria meat (beef or goat)
ingredients.notes: boneless and cut into small pieces

instructions: Heat oil in a large Dutch oven over medium heat.
Add the chopped onions and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the birria meat and cook until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Add the Oaxacan chili powder and stir to combine.
Add 2 cups of water and bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low and simmer, covered, for 1 1/2 hours or until the meat is tender.
Stir in the shredded mellow cheese until melted.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, topped with sliced morbier cheese.
